senses.gloss: to be silent, to be taciturn, to hold one's tongue, to hush up, to be quiet, to become quiet

examples.text:
Hadith
مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللّٰهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
man kāna yuʔminu bi-l-lāhi wal-yawmi l-ʔāḵiri falyaqul ḵayran ʔaw liyaṣmut
examples.english: Whoever believes in God and the Last Day, let him speak good or keep silent.
